name: HORA - Natural Hazard Overview & Risk Assessment Austria
dataType: Flood zones, earthquake, storm, hail, lightning, snow load risk maps
description: Interactive multi-hazard risk map platform for Austria covering floods, earthquakes, storms, hail, lightning, and snow with hydrodynamic 3D flood simulations for 40,000 km of river.

name: GeoSphere Austria Geoinformation Services
dataType: Geological maps, geophysical data, mineral resources, IRIS raw materials
description: GeoSphere Austria interactive map-based platform for geoscientific topics including geological maps, SKOS vocabularies, the IRIS raw materials information system, and the Tethys research data repository.

name: GeoSphere Austria Dataset API
dataType: Historical station climate data, gridded climate fields, radiation, phenology
description: Programmatic REST API for GeoSphere Austria historical climate station data and gridded climate datasets with documentation on GitHub, replacing the former ZAMG API.

name: KAGIS - Kärntner Geographisches Informationssystem
dataType: Orthophotos, cadastre, land use zoning, DEM, hazard zones, nature protection
description: Carinthia state GIS portal providing geodata infrastructure with open government data downloads covering orthophotos, land use, cadastre, elevation models, and environmental layers.

name: SAGIS - Salzburger Geographisches Informationssystem
dataType: Orthophotos, cadastre, land use, aerial imagery, up to 144 data layers
description: Salzburg state GIS offering up to 144 data layers including Austrian maps, orthophotos, cadastral maps, land use zoning and environmental data under the Open Government Data initiative.

name: VoGIS - Vorarlberger Geographisches Informationssystem
dataType: Orthophotos, DEM, roads, water networks, hazard zones, biotope inventory, 35 TB total
description: Vorarlberg state GIS maintaining 35 TB of geodata including road and water networks, digital land use plans, hazard zone plans, protected areas and biotope inventory with open data downloads.

name: GIS-Steiermark - Digital Atlas Styria
dataType: DEM, orthophotos, administrative boundaries, planning data, environmental layers
description: Styria state geoportal and digital atlas providing spatial data, geodata catalog, and planning foundations for state administration and external users.

name: Umweltbundesamt Austria OpenData
dataType: CORINE land cover, contaminated sites, water quality, soil, climate, biodiversity, noise, waste
description: Environment Agency Austria open data platform publishing machine-readable environmental datasets on data.gv.at covering CORINE land cover, contaminated sites, water, soil, climate, biodiversity, noise, and waste management.

name: ANCPI eTerra & INSPIRE Services
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property extracts, orthophotoplans, GNSS positioning
description: Romanian national cadastral e-service providing property information from the eTerra database, cadastral plan extracts, orthophotoplans, and INSPIRE-compliant view and download services via ArcGIS.

name: ANAR Flood Risk Maps Portal (inundatii.ro)
dataType: Flood hazard maps, flood risk maps, river basin management plans
description: Romanian national flood risk portal covering 526 areas with potential significant flood risk, providing EU Floods Directive-compliant hazard and risk maps and river basin flood risk management plans developed with World Bank support.

name: DGU CROTIS Topographic Data Services
dataType: CROTIS topographic database, DTM, gazetteer, spatial units register, digital cadastral plan
description: Croatian CROTIS topographic information system and data services providing the basic topographic database, DTM, digital cadastral plan, gazetteer of geographical names, and register of spatial units via OGC-compliant services.

name: ARSO eVode Water Portal
dataType: Real-time water levels, discharge, water temperature, LiDAR river surveys, flood areas
description: Slovenian Environment Agency water GIS portal providing real-time hydrological monitoring, water level and discharge data, LiDAR-based river surveys, flood zone mapping, and atlas of waters.

name: SGUDS Geological Survey of Slovakia
operator: SGUDS (State Geological Institute of Dionyz Stur)
dataType: Geological maps (1:50k, 1:500k), hydrogeological maps, geothermal data, mineral deposits
description: Slovak national geological survey providing digital geological, hydrogeological, hydrochemical, and geothermal maps with a dedicated map portal and INSPIRE-compliant geoportal.

name: UGKK Cadastre Portal Slovakia
operator: UGKK SR (Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre Authority)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property ownership, survey control points, geographic names, state borders
description: Slovak national cadastre portal (MAPKA) providing web-based access to cadastral data, survey control points, geographic names, and state border information integrated with ZBGIS spatial data.

name: Bulgaria INSPIRE Geoportal
dataType: INSPIRE spatial datasets, environmental monitoring, protected areas, water bodies
description: Bulgarian national INSPIRE geoportal aggregating spatial datasets from multiple agencies including the Ministry of Environment and Water, Executive Environment Agency, and cadastre authority with discovery, view, and download services.
